headline: SIGNAL SCAN — Mar 29, 2026
telegramText: SIGNAL SCAN — March 29, 2026 SNAPSHOT Stagflation regime intensifying as Iran war enters month 4 with markets pricing persistent supply shocks. Risk-off accelerating with VIX spiking to 31, crypto hemorrhaging institutional flows, and yields approaching 5% despite Fed pause. Cross-asset dislocation widening as commodities decouple from equities. POSITIONING BTC ETF flows: -$62M outflow (high significance) Whale positioning heavily short: BTC 115.4M short vs 23.3M long, ETH 26.2M short only Institutional crypto exodus accelerating with record exchange withdrawals suggesting capitulation phase IMPLICATION Tactical opportunity emerging in commodities vs crypto beta as geopolitical premium sustains while digital assets oversold. Consider defensive rotation into energy/staples while monitoring $58K BTC support for reversal signals. agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
